title: Encore! — song-guessing game
prompt: A song-guessing game for groups of friends. It should feel energetic, instantly understandable, socially competitive, and fun on both phones and laptops.

direction.name: Vinyl countdown
direction.thesis: A loud, warm party screen built around one object — a spinning record that is also the round timer — with chunky type, three confident colors, and scores that move like a crowd reacting.
direction.signature: The vinyl record IS the timer: it spins while the clip plays and its groove sweeps away as time runs out.
